title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket Ventures Solutions family as a Backend Developer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
